output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Send a Demand Letter in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup required.
content_outline: Why Landlords Get Away With Withholding Security Deposits
What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct (State Law Cheat Sheet)
How Long Your Landlord Legally Has to Return Your Deposit
The $19.99 Solution: How a Demand Letter Gets Results
Step-by-Step: Build and Send Your Letter in Under 60 Seconds
key_points: TikTok/Hook 1 — The Ghosting Landlord: 'POV: It’s been 45 days since move-out and your landlord just texted, "We’re keeping it for cleaning." Spoiler: they probably can’t. At Deposits-Back.com, send a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99. No signup. No subscription. Just your money back.'

TikTok/Hook 2 — The Deadline Violation: 'Your state gives your landlord 14–30 days to return your deposit. Missed the deadline? You might be owed double or triple damages. Stop sending ignored texts. Hit them with a legally formatted letter at Deposits-Back.com—$19.99, done in a minute.'

TikTok/Hook 3 — Normal Wear & Tear: 'Carpet wear, small nail holes, faded paint—your landlord CANNOT deduct "normal wear and tear" from your deposit. If they try, dispute it instantly with a demand letter that cites your state statute. $19.99. 60 seconds. Link in bio.'

TikTok/Hook 4 — The Dispute Letter Myth: 'You don’t need a lawyer to write a security deposit dispute letter. We built the template that auto-fills your state laws. Fill in your info, pay $19.99, download, and send. No hidden fees. No account required. Just results.'

TikTok/Hook 5 — The Runaround: '"I’ll send it next week." Three weeks later… nothing. If your landlord won’t give your deposit back, you need leverage—not patience. A formal demand letter from Deposits-Back.com shows you know your rights and you’re done waiting.'

Reel Script — Before/After Format: '[Before] Me: *checks mailbox for the 20th time* Still no deposit. [After] Me: *sends demand letter at Deposits-Back.com for $19.99* Landlord: *returns full deposit in 5 days*. Stop waiting. Start demanding. 60 seconds. No signup.'
output.cta: Get your deposit back in 60 seconds. Create your state-specific demand letter for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no signup, no subscription.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US tenants whose landlord is withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return a security deposit
